title: epilobium brevifolium subsp. trichoneurum
intro: Epilobium brevifolium subsp. trichoneurum, also known as the short-leaved willowherb, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, with medicinal compounds such as salicin and flavonoids contributing to its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Epilobium brevifolium subsp. trichoneurum is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to support overall health and well-being.
